title: Home
content: LES-EXPO YÜK MÜHENDİSLİĞİ FUARI 2026 --> The cooperation protocol for the LES-EXPO Fair, which will bring together all stakeholders of freight transportation requiring engineering, was signed. It is the first specialized fair that will bring together service providers and service recipients in the freight engineering services ecosystem, which contributes over 12 billion dollars to the Turkish economy, and it is being held in Istanbul. title: About Us
content: @* For more information on enabling MVC for empty projects, visit https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=397860 *@ @* For more information on enabling MVC for empty projects, visit https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=397860 *@ LES-EXPO Home Page / About Us ABOUT LES-EXPO Meeting in Istanbul on April 7-9 , 2026! LES-EXPO, the world's first and only specialized fair in the field of cargo engineering services, will be held at the Istanbul Expo Center between September 7-9, 2026. This giant organization, brought to life in cooperation with the Cargo Engineering Association (YMB) and KFA Fair Organization, brings together the leading companies of the sector from Europe, Asia and Africa, bringing together all components of the cargo engineering ecosystem under one roof. Playing a critical role in sectors such as construction, energy, maritime, heavy industry and infrastructure, cargo engineering services contribute approximately $12 billion to the Turkish economy annually. LES-EXPO will bring together crane, machinery, vehicle, equipment and service providers and provide the opportunity to learn about the latest technologies and solutions in the sector. The fair, which will be held in both indoor and outdoor areas at the Istanbul Expo Center, aims to increase the global cooperation of the cargo engineering sector by hosting visitors from three continents. Join! LES-EXPO to take your place in this important meeting that will shape the future of the cargo engineering sector What is Load Engineering? Load engineering is a multidisciplinary field that involves the safe, accurate and planned lifting, transportation and placement of loads of unusual size and weight. This process is not only realized with vehicles, but also with the planning, analysis and decisions of the expert engineers who manage these vehicles. Although not formally defined, load engineering encompasses critical processes such as risk analysis, ground assessment, vehicle selection and application monitoring in heavy-duty transport operations by land, air, sea, rail, and sometimes even undersea. With the change of technology, climate and projects, the variety of cargo transported is increasing, making the future role of cargo engineering specialists even more vital. The Future of Freight Engineering Takes Shape at Les-Expo LES-EXPO 2026 brings together the latest developments, technologies and innovative solutions in the cargo engineering sector. With the participation of expert companies and professionals in the field, this fair offers a unique opportunity to discover the latest trends in the sector and revolutionary innovations in engineering. LES-EXPO, the center of innovations, technological breakthroughs and strategic collaborations in the field of load engineering, is an international fair that brings together all stakeholders in the sector under one roof. Exhibiting a wide range of products and services from heavy-lifting systems to transportation solutions, from structural support technologies to digital planning tools, LES-EXPO is one of the gatherings that shape the engineering world. During the fair, while leading companies in the sector exhibit their latest products and projects, visitors have the opportunity to follow current trends on site, experience technologies with practical demonstrations, and communicate directly with experts in their fields. LES-EXPO is not only an exhibition area, but also a dynamic platform for sharing knowledge, transferring experience and establishing professional networks. This event, full of seminars, technical sessions and special events, offers an inspiring environment for both professionals looking for technical depth and those new to the sector. Freight Engineering Services: The Strategic Discipline of Heavy Transportation Load engineering is a multidisciplinary field that covers the safe, accurate and planned lifting, transportation and placement of loads of unusual size and weight. This process is not only realized with vehicles, but also with the planning, analysis and decisions of the expert engineers who manage these vehicles. Although not formally defined, load engineering encompasses critical processes such as risk analysis, ground assessment, vehicle selection, and implementation monitoring in heavy-lift operations by land, air, sea, rail, and sometimes even submarine. With the changing technology, climate and projects, the variety of cargoes transported is increasing, making the future role of cargo engineering specialists even more vital. OUR MISSION To support the development of companies operating in the field of lifting and transportation services requiring cargo engineering to ensure the rise of technology, occupational safety, human resources and ethical standards in the sector to carry out information sharing, cooperation and representation activities in order to increase the national and international competitiveness of our members. OUR VISION To be a leading non-governmental organization that is considered a reference in the field of load engineering in Türkiye and the world, plays an active role in determining sectoral standards, and pioneers innovative, sustainable and safe lifting-transportation solutions. Rise in Load Engineering: LES-EXPO LES-EXPO , the region's most comprehensive fair for construction equipment and heavy vehicle solutions, brings together the industry to showcase the latest technology in the freight engineering sector. Today, efficiency, safety and sustainability are indispensable concepts in the construction, mining, logistics and energy sectors. The companies that are pioneers of this transformation are making a difference in production with cranes with increased load-carrying capacities, smart excavators and automation-supported heavy-duty vehicles. The latest products and technologies exhibited at the fair are a source of inspiration not only for industry professionals, but also for all investors who want to shape the engineering solutions of the future. The graphic on the right is a concrete indicator of this rapid development process. R&D investments, sustainable designs and digitalization are increasing the growth momentum of the sector every day. LES-EXPO is not just an exhibition it is a strategic platform that takes the pulse of the sector and opens doors to business connections. The freight engineering technologies of the future are shaped here.

title: Exhibition Identification
content: LES-EXPO Home Page / Exhibition Identification LES-EXPO LES-EXPO-Cargo Engineering Services Fair Meets You at Istanbul Fair Center on April 7-9! Les-Expo 2026 brings together the latest developments, technologies and innovative solutions in the field of freight engineering services. This fair, which will be held with the participation of expert companies and professionals in the field, will offer you a unique opportunity to discover the latest trends in the sector and revolutionary innovations in engineering services. The fair, where Load Engineering services will be exhibited in an area of ​​28 thousand square meters at the Istanbul Fair Center, will offer both visitors and participants a business-oriented experience where technology and trends are at the forefront. Fair Calendar Tuesday LES-EXPO-Cargo Engineering Services Fair Wednesday LESEXPO-Cargo Engineering Services Fair Thursday LESEXPO-Cargo Engineering Services Fair Exhibition Identification Start Date: 07.04.2026 End Date: 09.04.2026 Fair Topic: Load Engineering Services Organizing Company: KFA Fuarcılık A.Ş. Visiting hours: 9.30 A.M - 6 P.M Fair Area: Istanbul Fair Center

title: Exhibition Area
content: LES-EXPO Home Page / Exhibition-Area Turkey's Largest Fairground Total fair area 200,000 m2 The largest international exhibition center in Eurasia Electronic parking system for 7500 vehicles (1 indoor and 2 outdoor giant parking lots) STRONG INFRASTRUCTURE AND SUPERIOR SERVICE It provides an infrastructure that will fully meet the energy, heating-cooling, air conditioning, telecommunication, water, air, compressed air requirements that will support all kinds of technological tools and systems. It responds to all needs immediately. Its proximity to the ring roads, the metro passing through the center, the availability of very large parking areas, environmental arrangements and excellent infrastructure have made İFM one of the attractive centers. It is located in the same complex together with İDTM Business Blocks, WOW Hotels, WOW Congress Center. PARKING AREA The 7500-vehicle capacity car park, arranged according to the hall locations, provides participants and visitors with comfortable accommodation and security throughout the fair.

title: How to Reach
content: LES-EXPO Home Page / How To Reach ? LESEXPO About About Us About LES-EXPO Exhibition Identification Exhibition Area How To Reach? Post Show Report Istanbul Expo Center (IEC) Opposite Ataturk Airport 34149 Yeşilköy Tel: (+90 212) 468 52 00 Fax: (+90 212) 465 59 59 E-mail: www.ifm.com.tr Thousands of companies meet new markets and opportunities through international fairs such as Cosmetics & Home Ingredients, which are held in the fair halls operated by the Istanbul World Trade Center, are considered to be among the world's largest fairs in their sectors and attract hundreds of thousands of visitors from home and abroad every year. You can use the following transportation options to reach the Fairground from other parts of Istanbul. Transportation Options to the Fairground Metrobus The fastest way to get to the fairground from Zincirlikuyu, Mecidiyeköy and Avcılar is by Metrobus. You can use the 34 A metrobus line, transfer from the Atatürk - Şirinevler stop to the Atatürk Airport (M1A) metro, get off at the World Trade Center/Istanbul Fair Center station and reach the fairground. www.iett.gov.tr Metro The Yenikapı-Ataturk Airport metro line (M1A) passes through the Istanbul World Trade Center/Istanbul Fair Center complex. Transfers can be made to the Ataturk Airport metro line from the Zeytinburnu or Şirinevler metrobus stops. metro.istanbul Bus You can reach Istanbul Fair Center by using HVİST-13 buses departing from Istanbul Airport and M1A Yenikapı-Atatürk Airport metro route from Ataköy-Şirinevler metro stop. www.iett.gov.tr Car You can reach the fairground by road from 3 alternative arteries (E5, TEM and Coastal Road). Marmaray You can reach the fairground in 5 minutes by taxi at the Yeşilyurt stop using the Halkalı-Gebze Marmaray line. https://marmaray.istanbul/

title: Insights
content: LES-EXPO Home Page / LES Insights LESEXPO LES Insights LES Insights B2B Meetings LES Insights LES Experiences LES Insights: LES-EXPO 2026 Istanbul: The Gathering of Those Who Design, Lift, Carry, and Drive the World's Load! Shaping the future of load engineering at LES Insights! LES Insights is a professional platform dedicated to presenting load engineering as an independent and multidisciplinary discipline. Through Dialogues and Spotlights sessions, we share the industry's best practices, innovative technologies, and sustainability-focused success stories. Dialogues: Interactive discussions bringing together industry stakeholders. Spotlights: Inspiring projects and expertise stories. From young engineers to industry leaders, LES Insights offers knowledge, connections, and inspiration for all. title: FAQ
content: LES-EXPO Home Page / Frequently Asked Questions Frequently Asked Questions (F.A.Q.) by Visitors How can I register as a visitor? You can register as a visitor online from the "Online Ticket" section on the homepage of our website. You can also register at the entrance on the day of the event, but online registration will provide faster entry. What are the visiting hours of the fair? The fair is open to visitors between 10:00-18:00 on weekdays and 10:00-20:00 on weekends. Last entry is 1 hour before closing. Where can I find the Fair Layout Plan? You can download the fair layout plan from the "Fair Area" section of our website. You can also get a free printed plan at the fair entrance. Where can I access the Participant List? You can access the participant list from the "Participant List" section of our website. The list is updated regularly. Where exactly is the Fairground located? The fair will be held at the Istanbul Fair Center. Address: Yeşilköy Istanbul, Fair Center, 34149 Bakırköy/İstanbul. You can find public transportation and private vehicle transportation information on our "Transportation" page. ? ? ? ?
summary: LES-EXPO Home Page / Frequently Asked Questions Frequently Asked Questions (F.A.Q.) by Visitors How can I register as a visitor? You can register as a visitor online from the "Online Ticket" section...
